comment_add: since rДҒji here is 1.3 - crack; and because in the Vibhanga in Permutations bandhanokДҒsa does not present, when abandhanokДҒsa is present to count as a full offence - the meaning here - An almsbowl with a mend that counts; From BMC: вҖңThe Vibhaб№…ga to the following rule says that a bhikkhu may ask for a new bowl if his current bowl has five mends or more, the space for a mend (В§) being two inches (fingerbreadths). The Commentary explains this first by saying that a bowl with five mends or more is damaged beyond repair, and thus loses its determination as a bowl. It then expands on the Vibhaб№…gaвҖҷs statements as follows: A clay bowl is damaged beyond repair if it has at least ten inches of cracks in it, the smallest of the cracks being at least two inches long. Cracks less than two inches long are said not to merit mendingвҖ”this is the meaning of the Vibhaб№…gaвҖҷs phrase, вҖңspace for a mendвҖқвҖ”and so do not count.

commentary: (VINa) paб№ҮбёҚako bhikkhave'ti ettha ДҒsittapaб№ҮбёҚako usЕ«yapaб№ҮбёҚako opakkamikapaб№ҮбёҚako pakkhapaб№ҮбёҚako napuб№ғsakapaб№ҮбёҚako'ti paГұca paб№ҮбёҚakДҒ. tattha yassa paresaб№ғ aб№…gajДҒtaб№ғ mukhena gahetvДҒ asucinДҒ ДҒsittassa pariбё·ДҒho vЕ«pasammati, ayaб№ғ ДҒsittapaб№ҮбёҚako. yassa paresaб№ғ ajjhДҒcДҒraб№ғ passato usЕ«yДҒya uppannДҒya pariбё·ДҒho vЕ«pasammati, ayaб№ғ usЕ«yapaб№ҮбёҚako. yassa upakkamena bД«jДҒni apanД«tДҒni, ayaб№ғ opakkamikapaб№ҮбёҚako. ekacco pana akusalavipДҒk'ДҒnubhДҒvena kДҒбё·apakkhe paб№ҮбёҚako hoti, juб№Үhapakkhe pan'assa pariбё·ДҒho vЕ«pasammati, ayaб№ғ pakkhapaб№ҮбёҚako. yo pana paб№ӯisandhiyaб№ғ'y'eva abhДҒvako uppanno, ayaб№ғ napuб№ғsakapaб№ҮбёҚako'ti. tesu ДҒsittapaб№ҮбёҚakassa ca usЕ«yapaб№ҮбёҚakassa ca pabbajjДҒ na vДҒritДҒ, itaresaб№ғ tiб№Үб№Үaб№ғ vДҒritДҒ. tesu'pi pakkhapaб№ҮбёҚakassa yasmiб№ғ pakkhe paб№ҮбёҚako hoti, tasmiб№ғ'y'evassa pakkhe pabbajjДҒ vДҒritДҒ'ti kurundiyaб№ғ vuttaб№ғ. yassa c'ettha pabbajjДҒ vДҒritДҒ, taб№ғ sandhДҒya idaб№ғ vuttaб№ғ, anupasampanno na upasampДҒdetabbo upasampanno nДҒsetabbo'ti. so'pi liб№…ganДҒsanen'eva nДҒsetabbo. ito paraб№ғ nДҒsetabbo'ti vuttesu'pi es'eva nayo.
